name: Vent in the comments, or to the bot!
description:
Hey! Do you feel you need to express your emotions? To vent about everything in your soul, but don't know who to go to? Here is where you can!

Vent to me, or the bot, I don't care! There's a chance I might not respond, but it's only because I don't know how to comfort. Anyways, have at it!
creator: cAIne_ther1ngmaster
